---
is-author-page: true
disable-spanning: true

author: "Serbestiyet"

author-bio: >
  Independent news site featuring news, analysis, and opinion on Türkiye's current affairs.

author-links:
  - icon: globe
    text: "Website"
    href: "https://serbestiyet.com"
  - icon: twitter
    text: "Twitter"
    href: "https://twitter.com/serbestiyet"

listing:
  contents: .
  type: grid
  sort: "date desc"
  grid-columns: 3
  page-size: 12
  fields: [image, title, date, description]
---
